commit.message: LicenseTest: make it work when both DEB and RPM packagings are enabled; TKit: remove clunky createRelativePathCopy(); follow-up changes.
Tweaks to make signing tests work on Catalina
SigningRuntimeImagePackageTest: fix test failure when DMG bundling is disabled and the test uses PKG bundling to create signed predefined runtime bundle.
cli/MainTest: fix testFailedCommandOutput() to make it pass when running the test with run_tests.sh jpackage test runner with the specified external runtime
